seoTitle: Lexia vs Linfarne — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lexia and Linfarne. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lexia and Linfarne.
heading: Lexia vs Linfarne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lexia, Western Australia and Linfarne, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Linfarne has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Lexia (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lexia or Linfarne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lexia has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Linfarne scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lexia scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Linfarne scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lexia or Linfarne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Linfarne has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
